root_text.sn46.16:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe.
root_text.sn46.16:1.2: Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā ābādhiko hoti dukkhito bāḷhagilāno.
root_text.sn46.16:1.3: Atha kho āyasmā mahācundo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho āyasmantaṁ mahācundaṁ bhagavā etadavoca:
root_text.sn46.16:2.1: “Sattime, bhante, bojjhaṅgā bhagavatā sammadakkhātā bhāvitā bahulīkatā abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.sn46.16:2.3: Satisambojjhaṅgo kho, bhante, bhagavatā sammadakkhāto bhāvito bahulīkato abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṁvattati …pe… upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo kho, bhante, bhagavatā sammadakkhāto bhāvito bahulīkato abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṁvattati.
root_text.sn46.16:2.4: Ime kho, bhante, satta bojjhaṅgā bhagavatā sammadakkhātā bhāvitā bahulīkatā abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṁvattantī”ti.
root_text.sn46.16:3.4: Tathāpahīno ca bhagavato so ābādho ahosīti.

translation_text.sn46.16:1.1: At one time the Buddha was staying near Rājagaha, in the Bamboo Grove, the squirrels’ feeding ground.
translation_text.sn46.16:1.2: Now at that time he was sick, suffering, gravely ill.
translation_text.sn46.16:1.3: Then Venerable Mahācunda went up to the Buddha, bowed, and sat down to one side. The Buddha said to him:
translation_text.sn46.16:1.4: “Cunda, express your understanding of the awakening factors.”
translation_text.sn46.16:2.1: “Sir, the Buddha has rightly explained these seven awakening factors. When developed and cultivated, they lead to direct knowledge, to awakening, and to extinguishment.
translation_text.sn46.16:2.3: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.16:2.4: These are the seven awakening factors that the Buddha has rightly explained. When developed and cultivated, they lead to direct knowledge, to awakening, and to extinguishment.”
translation_text.sn46.16:2.6: Indeed, Cunda, these are awakening factors!”
translation_text.sn46.16:3.3: And that’s how the Buddha recovered from that illness.
